steps.title: Spot the key definition
steps.content: The dash and following elaboration—"variations in size, shape, and material"—define what the blank word must mean.

steps.title: Match the word to the definition
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean variations or lack of uniformity — defined by the dash-clause "variations in size, shape, and material." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘restraints’: "High concentrations and restraints among particles" — restraints means limitations or controls placed on something, not variation in physical properties. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘inconsistencies’: "High concentrations and inconsistencies among particles" — inconsistencies means lack of uniformity, a direct match for "variations in size, shape, and material." ✓
  • Choice C — ‘incompatibilities’: "High concentrations and incompatibilities among particles" — incompatibilities means inability to coexist or work together, not mere variation in appearance. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘disruptions’: "High concentrations and disruptions among particles" — disruptions means disturbances or interruptions, not differences in size or material. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
